commits.subject: Day 114 (04:21): Close task unlanded source-edit gap in completion gate (Task 2)

eval.reason: Self-tests pass and 45-line diff addresses all core gaps: auto_commit now distinguishes "nothing staged" (committed=false with file_exists/file_missing diagnostics) from successful commit, covers phantom files that fail git add, and adds an already-landed verify edge case. The JSON payload now includes uncommitted_source_files and source_files fields per spec.
